productDisplayName: Spice Art Women Zircons Gold Clutch
description: Look your glamorous best with this spice art clutch, customised for the ethnic diva in you. Show off your traditional side with this piece, which is as functional as it is fashionable. Width: 27 cm Height: 12 cm Made of synthetic leather with a nylon inner lining Stone embellishments on the top width of the clutch One main compartment with a magnetic clasp A zippered compartment with a mobile pouch inside the main compartment Care Wipe surface with a damp clean cloth
